package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for tests_couple_to_gorm_model_for_api_contract_assertions: API tests that assert persistence model shapes instead of response contracts.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule203NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule203NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule203NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario203Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule203NegativeService, input Rule203NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
